Bash(python3 -c " from PIL import Image import sys img = Image.open\(''/home/brett/Documents/projects/sps-suresend/images/SureSendLogo.png''\).convert\(''RGBA''\) print\(f''Size: {img.size}, Mode: {img.mode}''\) # Get color frequency from collections import Counter pixels = list\(img.getdata\(\)\) # Filter out transparent pixels opaque = [\(r,g,b\) for r,g,b,a in pixels if a > 128] # Quantize to reduce noise quantized = [\(r//16*16, g//16*16, b//16*16\) for r,g,b in opaque] counter = Counter\(quantized\) print\(''Top 20 colors \(RGB\):''\) for color, count in counter.most_common\(20\): pct = count/len\(opaque\)*100 print\(f'' rgb{color} = #{color[0]:02x}{color[1]:02x}{color[2]:02x} \({pct:.1f}%\)''\) ")
